name: plan-forge
description: Adversarial plan review between AI coding agents: one model drafts an implementation plan, another reviews it, and unresolved blocker/major findings drive full-plan revisions until approval or an auditable human handoff.

interface.longDescription: Plan Forge orchestrates Claude Code and Codex CLI as an author/reviewer pair. One agent drafts a complete implementation plan for a frozen requirement; the other reviews it against the repository. Blocker and major findings force full-plan revisions until approval or an auditable human handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use $plan-forge to review this implementation plan.
Use $plan-forge to structure this requirement first.
Run an adversarial plan review before coding.
